programme.title: 🇲🇽 MEXICO vs SOUTH AFRICA 🇿🇦
programme.desc: 🔥 OPENING MATCH - WORLD CUP 2026 🏟️ Stadium: Estadio Azteca, Mexico City ──────────────────────── 📋 GROUP A STANDINGS: 🇲🇽 MEXICO (Host) 🇿🇦 SOUTH AFRICA 🇰🇷 SOUTH KOREA 🇨🇿 CZECH REPUBLIC ──────────────────────── ⚽ Kick-off your World Cup journey!

programme.title: 🇰🇷 SOUTH KOREA vs CZECH REPUBLIC 🇨🇿
programme.desc: ⚽ WORLD CUP 2026 - GROUP STAGE A 🏟️ Stadium: Akron Stadium, Guadalajara ──────────────────────── 📋 GROUP A STANDINGS: 🇲🇽 MEXICO (Host) 🇿🇦 SOUTH AFRICA 🇰🇷 SOUTH KOREA 🇨🇿 CZECH REPUBLIC ──────────────────────── ⭐ Star Players: Son Heung-min vs Patrik Schick
